---
title: "R Class Sample"
author: "Keah Tandon"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

```


## Components of a Package

- Functions

- Documentation

- Vignettes



## Steps for Working on a Package

```{r}

#library(devtools)

load_all()

#check()

#document()

```

```{r}

?generate_correlated

n <- 100
mean <- 0
var <- 1
skew <- 0
kurt <- 0
slope <- 1
r <- 0.5
summary <- TRUE
decimals <- 3
replication <- 1

output <- generate_correlated(n = n, mean = mean, var = var,
                              skew = skew, kurt = kurt,
                              slope = slope, r = r,
                              summary = summary, decimals = decimals,
                              replication = replication)

output

```

```{r}

data <- output$sample

data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = X1, y = X2)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline()

```

```{r}

model <- lm(X2 ~ X1, data)

summary(model)

cor(data$X1, data$X2)

```
